title: Youtap BOS (Android & iOS)
summary: Architected and led end-to-end delivery of Youtap BOS, a comprehensive merchant operations platform powering over 500,000 merchants across Android, iOS, and Web, handling product management, real-time inventory, and high-volume transaction workflows.
description:
Youtap BOS is an omnichannel business operations platform built for PT. Mitra Digital Sukses under Salim Group, serving over 500,000 merchants across 510+ cities in Indonesia.

As Tech Lead, I owned the full technical lifecycle from microservices architecture on NestJS to cross-platform delivery on Ionic and Angular. I defined service boundaries, led cross-functional engineering teams, and maintained release quality through continuous delivery checkpoints.

The platform powers critical merchant operations: product catalog management, real-time inventory tracking across multiple warehouses, multi-payment gateway integration with 70+ providers under a unified API layer, transaction processing, and a reporting engine that delivers actionable business intelligence.

Shipped continuous feature releases while maintaining 99.9% uptime for half a million daily active merchants.

title: Youtap BOS Web
summary: Built and maintained the web counterpart of Youtap BOS, delivering the same merchant operations platform through a responsive Angular interface that serves over 500,000 merchants alongside the mobile apps.
description:
Youtap BOS Web is the browser-based interface of the Youtap BOS platform, built with Angular and the same NestJS backend powering the mobile apps. It gives merchants and operations teams full control over product management, inventory, transactions, and business reporting on desktop.

I led the web engineering team, owning architecture decisions and delivery cadence. Since the web app shares services with the mobile apps, I ensured consistent behavior across platforms by establishing shared component libraries, unified API contracts, and cross-team code review practices.

Shipped continuous UI and feature updates while maintaining 99.9% uptime across all platforms.

title: Youtap Portal
summary: Built and scaled Youtap Portal, the internal operations platform used by Youtap teams to manage merchant onboarding, monitor platform health, and handle administrative workflows across the BOS ecosystem.
description:
Youtap Portal is the internal operations dashboard used by Youtap Indonesia to manage merchant lifecycle, platform monitoring, and administrative tasks. While the BOS apps serve merchants directly, this portal empowers the internal ops team to onboard new merchants, resolve issues, and keep the platform running smoothly.

As Tech Lead, I drove the technical roadmap and cross-team delivery across frontend and backend. The frontend is built with React, while critical backend services are written in Golang for high-performance processing. I introduced role-based access control to separate merchant-facing admins from platform super-admins, built a real-time platform health dashboard, and set up automated alerting for transaction anomalies and system thresholds.

Supports hundreds of internal users across operations, finance, and support teams with 99.9% uptime.

title: GreatDay HR Platform
summary: Contributed to GreatDay HR, a comprehensive HRIS platform serving 3,000+ companies across Asia, covering core HR, recruitment, attendance, payroll, and performance modules.
description:
GreatDay HR is a comprehensive HRIS platform developed by PT People Intelligence Indonesia, serving 3,000+ companies across Asia. The platform covers core HR, recruitment, attendance, payroll, and performance management modules.

As Senior Software Developer, I contributed to feature delivery and technical supervision across both mobile and backend components. I led the development of attendance tracking with geofencing, leave workflow automation, and payroll integration modules. I also supported requirement analysis, code quality reviews, and release readiness with the engineering team.

Mobile apps built with Ionic served field employees, while the backend was powered by a microservices architecture using NestJS and Node.js, with Kotlin and Java services handling legacy system integrations.

title: Youtap Online Order
summary: Built Youtap Online Order, the digital ordering module within the BOS ecosystem that enables merchants to accept and manage customer orders through mobile and web channels.
description:
Digital ordering module within the Youtap BOS ecosystem, enabling merchants to accept and manage customer orders across mobile and web channels. Integrated with the NestJS backend and 70+ payment gateway providers to deliver a seamless order-to-payment experience.

As Tech Lead, I owned end-to-end delivery of the ordering flow, from menu display and cart management through payment processing and order status tracking. Coordinated cross-team development to ensure consistent user experience and reliable performance during high-traffic periods.

The module extended BOS beyond inventory and payment into customer-facing commerce, supporting hundreds of thousands of daily transactions across the merchant network.

summary: Developed attendance and workforce kiosk capabilities within the GreatDay ecosystem.
title: GreatDay Kiosk
description:
GreatDay Kiosk is a self-service attendance and check-in solution for workplaces, allowing employees to clock in and manage attendance directly through kiosk terminals. Part of the GreatDay HR suite serving 3,000+ companies across Asia.

As Senior Software Developer, I contributed to kiosk-specific workflows including facial recognition or ID-based check-in, shift management integration, and real-time sync with the central HRIS backend. Ensured reliable performance in high-traffic workplace scenarios.

summary: Built and maintained internal CMS tooling to support operational content and admin workflows.
title: Youtap Internal CMS
description: This internal CMS project was designed to streamline back-office configuration and content operations. I managed implementation quality and delivery cadence so internal teams could operate faster with clearer administrative control.

summary: Delivered supporting products in the GreatDay ecosystem for attendance and workforce operations.
title: GreatDay Lite, Kiosk & Thermal
description:
GreatDay Lite, Kiosk, and Thermal are specialized attendance solutions within the GreatDay HR suite, each tailored to different operational environments. Lite serves general attendance tracking, Kiosk handles self-service terminal check-ins, and Thermal supports temperature-based attendance logging for regulated industries.

As Senior Software Developer, I built and maintained cross-platform attendance modules across all three products, integrating with the central NestJS backend and ensuring consistent data synchronization with the broader HRIS platform serving 3,000+ companies.

summary: Managed and delivered an ecommerce ecosystem spanning internal system, warehouse, store management, and customer storefront.
title: Siafu Shop Ecommerce Suite
description:
End-to-end commerce and operations suite for Siafu Shop, consolidating inventory management, warehouse operations, store management, and customer-facing ecommerce into a unified platform. Built with Angular on the frontend and NestJS microservices on the backend, with Kotlin services handling legacy system integrations.

As Project Manager and Lead Developer, I oversaw full project delivery from client requirements through deployment. Managed a cross-functional team across frontend, backend, and mobile, coordinated timelines with stakeholders, and ensured reliable release cycles for a business-critical internal system.

The platform digitized core retail operations for the client, streamlining order fulfillment, stock visibility, and multi-channel sales management.

summary: Built Android mobile experience for Gurihmart with a focus on usability and stable transactional flows.
title: Gurihmart Mobile Android
description:
Gurihmart is an Android mobile application for a retail business, built with Kotlin to support in-store operations and customer transactions. I was responsible for the front-end implementation as a Mobile Developer.

The app included product browsing, cart management, and checkout flows with payment integration. I focused on building a clean, intuitive interface and ensuring transaction reliability, which is critical for retail use cases.

Delivered a stable, performant Android application that supported the client's daily sales operations.

summary: Developed front-end features for the APCCA event web experience using React.
title: APCCA
description:
APCCA is an event web platform delivered as part of a client engagement project. I was responsible for building the front-end features and interactive components that supported the event experience.

Built with React and Next.js, the project involved implementing event registration flows, schedule displays, and content pages under a tight timeline. I worked directly with the design team to ensure pixel-perfect delivery and smooth user interactions across devices.

This project strengthened my ability to deliver production-quality front-end work within fixed project timelines while coordinating with multiple stakeholders.

summary: Built interactive event web pages and front-end modules for Army Open House.
title: Army Open House
description:
Army Open House is a public-facing event microsite that required high-traffic-ready front-end delivery. I built the interactive pages and campaign modules that handled the event's promotional and informational needs.

The site was built with React and Next.js, featuring dynamic content sections, countdown timers, and responsive layouts optimized for both mobile and desktop visitors. Load performance was a key consideration given the traffic spikes typical of event launches.

I delivered all front-end components on schedule and handled post-launch bug fixes during the event period.

summary: Developed a campaign microsite experience with React-based front-end delivery.
title: FB4fan
description:
FB4fan is a brand campaign microsite built for a client engagement. I developed the front-end from design mockups, implementing the interactive experience using React and Next.js.

The project involved building a fan engagement interface with dynamic content, user interaction features, and social sharing integration. I worked closely with the backend team to wire up API-driven content updates and ensured smooth transitions between pages.

Delivered on time with all interactive features functioning correctly across targeted browsers and devices.

summary: Implemented event and content web interfaces for HTX campaign delivery.
title: HTX
description:
HTX is a campaign web platform delivered as part of a client project. I was responsible for implementing the front-end interfaces and interactive elements that made up the user experience.

Built with React and Next.js, the project included content-rich pages, interactive media sections, and campaign-specific call-to-action flows. I ensured the site was fully responsive and optimized for fast initial load times.

Completed within the project timeline with all features matching the approved designs.

summary: Built responsive web front-end experiences for Hideout campaign execution.
title: Hideout
description:
Hideout is a campaign microsite built to support an event activation. I developed the front-end using React and Next.js, translating designs into fully functional, responsive web pages.

The scope included building interactive sections, media galleries, and campaign-specific user flows. I managed the component architecture to keep the codebase maintainable as requirements evolved during the project.

Delivered all pages and interactive modules on schedule with clean, well-structured code.

summary: Delivered React-based campaign web development for YSL activation.
title: YSL
description:
YSL is a brand campaign microsite where I built the front-end using React and Next.js. The project required translating a visually rich brand campaign into a responsive, performant web experience.

I implemented the interactive campaign pages, media galleries, and promotional sections. Close attention was paid to matching the brand's visual standards and ensuring smooth animations and transitions.

Delivered on time with all campaign features functioning correctly across desktop and mobile devices.

summary: Developed conference web experience for SATLF using React stack.
title: SATLF
description:
SATLF is a conference web platform delivered for a client event. I built the front-end using React and Next.js, creating the pages and interactive features that supported the conference experience.

The project included speaker line-up displays, session schedules, registration flows, and an attendee information hub. I implemented dynamic schedule filtering and search functionality to help attendees navigate the conference program efficiently.

Delivered within the project timeline with a fully responsive design and all interactive features working correctly.

summary: Developed front-end experience for Women in Sport event platform.
title: Women in Sport
description:
Women in Sport is an event web platform built to support a campaign focused on female athletes and sports participation. I developed the front-end using React and Next.js.

The scope included content-rich pages, event schedules, participant profiles, and interactive campaign sections. I worked to ensure the site was visually engaging and performed well on mobile devices, which were the primary audience channel.

Delivered on schedule with all pages matching approved designs and all interactive features working correctly.

title: TAIF
summary: Implemented React-based web UI delivery for TAIF event platform.
description:
TAIF is an event web platform where I implemented the front-end using React and Next.js. The project involved building pages that supported the event's information and registration needs.

I developed the component structure, responsive layouts, and interactive elements from design mockups. Performance optimization and cross-browser compatibility were part of the delivery requirements.

Completed on schedule with all features functioning correctly across target devices and browsers.

summary: Delivered front-end pages and campaign interactions for NARS web initiative.
title: NARS
description:
NARS is a campaign web project where I built the front-end interfaces and interactive components using React and Next.js.

The scope covered campaign landing pages with interactive elements, product showcase sections, and campaign-specific user journeys. I worked from design files and coordinated with the backend to ensure API data was correctly represented in the interface.

Delivered on schedule with all interactive features tested and functional across supported devices.

summary: Built and delivered frontend features for a service platform while coordinating engineering execution.
title: MOCUCIMOBILKU Platform
description:
Multi-platform vehicle financing portal developed for Astra Honda's MOCUCIMOBILKU program, enabling dealers and customers to process financing applications online. Built with Angular and Ionic for cross-platform frontend coverage, with NestJS handling backend application workflows and data processing.

As Frontend Developer, I led UI development and ensured consistent cross-platform experience between web and mobile. Coordinated with backend teams to maintain reliable API integration and predictable milestone delivery for a high-visibility automotive fintech product under the Astra Group umbrella.

summary: Built front-end campaign pages and user journeys for Singapore Day web activation.
title: Singapore Day
description:
Singapore Day is a web activation project for a brand campaign. I developed the front-end pages and user journeys using React and Next.js, translating the campaign concept into an engaging web experience.

The work included interactive content sections, media displays, and campaign-specific call-to-action flows. I ensured the site was performant on mobile devices, which were the primary access point for the target audience.

All pages and features were delivered on schedule and matched the approved designs closely.

summary: Built and refined web front-end modules for Zodiac web campaign delivery.
title: Zodiac Web
description:
Zodiac is a campaign web project where I built and refined the front-end modules using React and Next.js. The work involved implementing campaign pages with interactive elements and brand-consistent styling.

I developed multiple page templates, interactive components, and media sections from design mockups. The project required attention to detail to match the campaign's visual identity precisely.

Delivered all modules on schedule with clean, maintainable code and no critical bugs at launch.

summary: Built a custom marketing system with structured workflow and client-oriented delivery.
description: Official website for a trusted tourism and travel bus company based in Malang, East Java. Developed using WordPress with key features including company profile pages, Bus Malam (overnight bus) and package delivery services, fleet gallery (JETBUS 5 SHD Combi, JETBUS 5 SHD Scania, Volvo B11R, JETBUS 3 SDD Green Platinum), online ticket booking system, and contact information. Served as both Developer and Project Manager, responsible for the full development lifecycle from planning through deployment, including stakeholder coordination and content management.
title: Gunung Harta Transport Solutions

summary: Developed a tourism information platform to support local promotion and operational data management.
title: Tourism System - Sawahlunto
description: This project delivered a web-based tourism information system with practical content and operational workflows. I was involved in requirements analysis, development, and quality review to ensure stable usage and maintainability.

summary: Delivered a government information system with structured data and workflow management.
title: Government Information System - Raja Ampat
description: The project was built to support institutional administration and data operations in a public sector context. I handled implementation and technical leadership tasks, including requirement review, delivery planning, and code quality control.

summary: Delivered a web portal project with end-to-end planning, execution, and stakeholder alignment.
title: Kirby Web Portal
description: Kirby Web Portal required tight coordination between requirements, implementation, and release timeline. I managed team progress and delivery quality while ensuring the final output supported practical business workflows.

summary: Built an internal operational system to improve organizational process visibility and reporting.
title: Internal System - Center of Study for Indonesian Leadership
description: The project focused on internal process digitization and information flow for institutional operations. I contributed to requirement translation, application development, and release quality checks in collaboration with team stakeholders.

summary: Built healthcare operational software to support hospital workflow and information handling.
description: This system focused on practical hospital operations and information processing for day-to-day workflow needs. I worked on implementation delivery and maintained alignment between functional requirements and technical execution.
title: Hospital Benmari

summary: Led a mobile learning initiative with coordinated team delivery and iterative feature releases.
title: Learning Project Mobile Apps
description: The learning mobile app project focused on combining practical content delivery with a scalable technical foundation. I managed implementation flow, requirement alignment, and quality review to ensure stable releases and maintainable code.

summary: Contributed to enterprise application development with a focus on Angular implementation.
title: Engine 5 Application
description: At Visionet Data International, I worked on the Engine 5 application and delivered features based on business requirements. The role strengthened my experience in enterprise software delivery and maintainable frontend development practices.

summary: Delivered thermal and attendance-support workflows for workforce operations in GreatDay.
title: GreatDay Thermal
description: GreatDay Thermal was built to support operational attendance scenarios that required hardware-assisted checks and stable data handling. I worked on implementation and quality improvements to keep the module dependable for enterprise usage.

summary: Led redesign and implementation of a public-facing enterprise website for stronger brand and communication impact.
title: PTAR Public Website Redesign, Development & Implementation
description: This initiative included redesign planning, development execution, and production implementation for PTAR's public website. I coordinated cross-functional delivery, managed project timeline, and ensured the final output met both visual quality and operational maintainability standards.

summary: Developing a web portal for loyalty campaign workflows and campaign execution management.
title: Loyalty Campaign Portal oneNZ
description:
oneNZ Loyalty Campaign Portal is a web-based platform for managing loyalty campaign workflows, from campaign creation and participant tracking to reward fulfillment and reporting. I am leading the front-end development effort on this ongoing project.

Built with React and TypeScript, the portal provides campaign managers with a dashboard to configure campaigns, monitor participation metrics, and manage reward distributions. I am responsible for the component architecture, state management, and integration with the campaign backend APIs.

The portal is designed to handle high volumes of campaign activity with real-time updates and a clean, efficient user experience for campaign operators.

title: Youtap POS Mobile
summary: Built Youtap POS Mobile, a next-generation POS mobile application for merchant operations and daily transactions, part of the Youtap POS ecosystem serving 500K+ merchants across Indonesia.
description:
Youtap POS Mobile is a next-generation point-of-sale mobile application built with Flutter, powering merchant daily operations across Indonesia's POS ecosystem. The product targets Retail, FnB, and Service business types, and is part of the broader Youtap POS platform that has been adopted by over 500,000 merchants.

The app covers core POS capabilities including digital cashier functions, product catalog management, cart and checkout flows, split bill handling, barcode scanning, transaction recording, and receipt generation. Merchants can manage multiple users (cashiers), track daily transaction reports, handle payment cancellations, and customize receipts for branding purposes.

Built with Flutter and Dart targeting both Android and iOS from a single codebase. I implemented core POS screens, integrated with the payment gateway layer, and ensured transaction flows were smooth and reliable for high-frequency merchant use. The app connects to the broader Youtap ecosystem including inventory management, e-menu, and online ordering modules.

title: FIFGROUP Website
summary: Official corporate website for PT Federal International Finance (FIFGROUP), a leading non-bank financing company and Astra Group subsidiary.
description: Official corporate website for PT Federal International Finance (FIFGROUP), a leading non-bank financing company and subsidiary of Astra Group, consistently ranked among Indonesia's Top 100 Most Valuable Brands. The website serves as the digital front door for multiple business lines: FIFASTRA (motorcycle financing), SPEKTRA (electronics financing), DANASTRA (multipurpose financing), FINATRA (UMKM/business financing), AMITRA (pilgrimage financing), FLEET (corporate fleet financing), and FIFGROUP Card. Led the end-to-end delivery as Developer and Head of Delivery, overseeing development using Angular and Java with PostgreSQL, coordinating cross-functional teams, and ensuring timely deployment and quality standards.
